name: 24" Unlit Flocked Indexed Mini Artificial Christmas Tree - Wondershop™
description:
Add a lovely touch of the winter season to your interior space with this Unlit Flocked Indexed Artificial Mini Christmas Tree from Wondershop™. This artificial Christmas tree adds seasonal charm to your table decor. Easy to set up with an indexed profile, it's covered with green snow-flocked branches for a winter-inspired natural look. This decorative 24-inch tree comes with an attached round base for easy placement. Add whimsical ornaments and colored lights for a fun look.

Wondershop™: Welcome to the Wondershop.
